title: totem Eggplant
description: make your totem look like Eggplant
body: eggplant is a fun and meme-style resourcepack that replaces the default Totem of Undying texture in Minecraft with a hilarious, exaggerated face inspired by Arabic meme culture. It’s made purely for entertainment — combining humor, creativity, and modern meme vibes to bring laughter to your gameplay moments
